message:
feat: extract Lance v2 schema from manifest (column names + types)

Parse schema fields (name, logicalType, id, parentId, nullable) from
Lance manifest protobuf field 1 (repeated Field messages). Apply
manifest schema to fragment column metadata in loadDatasetFromR2 and
executeLanceWholeFile, replacing default column_N/int64 fallbacks.

Also fixes:
- readVarint consuming only 5 bytes for 10-byte negative int32 varints
  (e.g., parentId = -1), which misaligned all subsequent field reads
- executeMultiFragment now routes Lance fragments with empty pages to
  executeLanceWholeFile instead of scanPages
- logicalTypeToDataType maps Lance types (double, string, etc.) to
  DataType enum

Adds manifest fixture tests for simple_int64, simple_float64, and
mixed_types Lance datasets.
